data.title: HireArt survey challenges gig economy assumptions, finds contractors value stability and development over flexibility.
data.description: A recent survey conducted by HireArt in 2025 has questioned the common beliefs around the gig economy and is urging employers to reconsider their approach to contingent talent. The workforce management platform based in New York is prompting a shift in strategy to better accommodate this flexible workforce. The survey’s findings indicate a significant shift in the way companies should engage with contingent workers, emphasizing the need for a more thoughtful and inclusive process. This call to action is based on the changing landscape, making it essential for companies to adapt to the new paradigm. With key insights and data gathered from the survey, HireArt is making a compelling case for businesses to reevaluate and optimize their utilization of contingent talent. This move towards a more strategic and tailored approach could lead to enhanced workforce management and efficiency in the years to come.

data.title: Hyundai Mobis aims to cut greenhouse gases by 46% compared to 2019 levels by 2030, boosting order competitiveness.
data.description: Hyundai Mobis has received approval from the Science Based Targets initiative (SBTi) for its goal to slash greenhouse gas emissions by 46% by 2030 in comparison to its 2019 levels. This move is foreseen to enhance the organization's competitive edge in global orders, making it eligible for the UK electric vehicle grant program.

data.title: RTX's Raytheon completes ground-launched StormBreaker test in just 50 days. Financial symbol: RTX (NYSE).
data.description: Raytheon, a business under RTX (NYSE: RTX), has successfully completed testing for a ground-launched version of the StormBreaker® smart weapon in just 50 days. This prototype was developed and tested in Tucson, Arizona, with no further details provided about the specific features or success rate. The impressive speed at which this new variant was created and tested showcases the efficiency and capabilities of Raytheon in the development of advanced weaponry.

data.title: Imagine Learning offers free, six-part AI webinar series for K-12 educators to meet demand for AI guidance.
data.description: A professional learning series is now available to meet the increasing need for reliable AI guidance in K-12 education. Imagine Learning, a leading digital curriculum provider in the United States, has revealed the start of Teaching in the Age... event on September 24, 2025, in Tempe, Arizona. The company, recognized for offering innovative education solutions, aims to address the demand by educators for trustworthy AI support. This initiative comes at a time where educators are seeking ways to integrate technology effectively in teaching, with Imagine Learning being a key player in meeting this need.

data.title: Seraphic enhances identity security by enabling real-time enforcement at the browser level. Introduced new capabilities at Oktane, aiming for immediate risk-based enforcement.
data.description: On September 24, 2025, in Las Vegas, Seraphic, the top provider of Secure Enterprise Browser (SEB) technology, revealed at Oktane the introduction of groundbreaking identity-centric features. These functions convert identity signals into swift, risk-based actions at the browser level. The latest update includes expanded support for enhanced security measures, marking a significant advancement in digital protection strategies by leveraging identity data for proactive security enforcement.

data.title: CData Software launches Connect AI, offers live access to 300+ enterprise systems at second conference.
data.description: In the latest development, CData Software unveiled Connect AI at their second annual Foundations conference in Chapel Hill, N.C. on September 24, 2025. This innovative platform is the first of its kind to provide AI applications with semantic rich context by offering governed, live access to over 300 enterprise systems. Connect AI aims to revolutionize the way AI technologies interact with data by ensuring seamless integration with a wide range of systems, significantly expanding the scope of AI capabilities.

data.title: Michroma and CJ CheilJedang partner to advance commercial production of bio-colorants; Michroma's first product for production.
data.description: A new collaboration has been revealed to enhance the commercial production of Michroma's bio-colorants. Michroma's initial colorant offering is set to be explored for potential commercial manufacturing with CJ CheilJedang in a joint effort. This collaborative partnership was made public in San Francisco and Seoul, South Korea on September 24, 2025. This marks a significant step forward for Michroma and entails promising opportunities for both companies involved.
China to expand supply for digital consumption - MofCom

data.title: CPS Energy acquires 1,632 MW power generation portfolio in Texas for $1.387 billion.
data.description: In San Antonio on September 24, 2025, CPS Energy revealed the completion of its purchase of PROENERGY's four natural gas power generation plants. These facilities have a combined electric capacity of around 1,632 megawatts. The deal amounted to $1.387 billion, pending the usual net adjustments.
TD No Longer Forecast RBA Cuts In November And February

data.title: Campaign launched to support nurses as 40% plan to leave due to burnout, mental health strain, and staffing shortages.
data.description: In New York on September 24, 2025, it was revealed that nurses, crucial to the U.S. healthcare system, are facing significant challenges. Over 40% of nurses are intending to depart from their profession due to burnout, mental health issues, and persistent staffing deficiencies. This trend underscores a pressing need for effective resolutions to address the escalating crisis in the healthcare sector.

data.title: AVAX price hits $34 amid $1B treasury plan reveal. Trading at $34.17 post 10% surge, with RSI indicating overbought status near $36.16 resistance.
data.description: The cryptocurrency AVAX is currently trading at $34.17, up 10% due to treasury initiatives. However, the Relative Strength Index (RSI) indicates overbought conditions as it nears the key resistance level of $36.16.

data.title: XRP price up 6.8% post pullback, aims for $4 with crucial support levels to maintain for bullish trend, say analysts.
data.description: Following a recent pullback in the crypto market on Monday, the price of XRP has surged by 6.8%. Traders emphasize the importance of maintaining key support levels to facilitate a sustained recovery towards achieving new all-time highs.

data.title: ProRx Pharma awarded DEA Controlled Substances Registration; enhances compliance and partnerships.
data.description: ProRx Pharma, a prominent 503B outsourcing facility specializing in health and wellness, has enhanced its capabilities, fortified compliance measures, and bolstered provider partnerships through a recent certification. The company, based in EXTON, Pa., shared news of its acquisition of a DEA Controlled Substances Registration on September 24, 2025. This certification showcases ProRx Pharma’s commitment to quality and regulatory standards, fostering trust among its stakeholders.

data.title: Sono and Mitsubishi Heavy Industries Thermal Transport Europe partner for solar-powered electric reefer trailers. Demo available at NUFAM.
data.description: Sono Solar's subsidiary, in collaboration with MTTE, has introduced a cutting-edge solar-powered system for eTRUs on semi-trailers. The innovative technology will be showcased at NUFAM Karlsruhe from September 25 to 28, 2025. The first demo trailer will be displayed for fleet trials and public viewing at this event, marking a significant advancement in sustainable transport solutions. This fully integrated solar-powered system is designed to enhance the efficiency and eco-friendliness of semi-trailers, offering a glimpse into the future of transportation. Be sure to witness this groundbreaking technology in action during the event to experience the potential of renewable energy in the transport industry.

data.title: Cavendish Hydrogen secures contract with PAK-PCE Stacje H2 in Poland for Rybnik station upgrade.
data.description: In Oslo, Norway on September 24, 2025, Cavendish Hydrogen ASA (Cavendish) shared news of a new contract deal. The company has secured a significant contract with PAK-PCE Stacje H2 (PAK-PCE H2 Stations), a subsidiary of the Polsat Plus capital group. This contract pertains to an enhancement project for the Rybnik station. Cavendish's Oslo Børs ticker is CAVEN.

data.title: Cryptocurrency prices holding steady with Bitcoin at $113,107.48 and Ethereum at $4,189.86. 128,606 traders liquidated for $284.15M in 24 hours. Spot Bitcoin ETFs had net outflows of $103.6M.
data.description: The cryptocurrency markets saw a slight uptick on Wednesday morning following subdued performance in recent days. Current prices are as follows: Bitcoin (BTC) at $113,107.48, Ethereum (ETH) at $4,189.86, Solana (SOL) at $212.36, XRP at $2.87, Dogecoin (DOGE) at $0.2431, and Shiba Inu (SHIB) at $0.00001223. According to Coinglass, 128,606 traders were liquidated in the last 24 hours, resulting in losses amounting to $284.15 million. SoSoValue reported net outflows of $103.6 million from spot Bitcoin ETFs, and net outflows of $140.8 million from spot Ethereum ETFs on Tuesday. Analysts at More Crypto Online noted that Bitcoin is currently hovering near the 61.8% retracement level of $111,220, with a potential recovery if it surpasses $114,010. However, a decline to a lower level could weaken the bullish outlook. For more details, visit a reliable news platform.

data.title: MATIC price hovers around $0.38, as Polygon indicates mixed signals with potential buying opportunities amid bearish momentum.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Polygon (MATIC) is currently trading at $0.38, showing a bearish trend as per momentum indicators. However, the Relative Strength Index (RSI) indicates potential oversold status, hinting at possible buying opportunities for traders.

data.title: Pi Health partners with GSK to improve clinical trials with outsourced services, focusing on a global Phase 2 oncology trial.
data.description: Pi Health, a worldwide health technology and clinical research firm based in Cambridge, Massachusetts, has revealed plans to offer comprehensive outsourced clinical research services for a GSK clinical trial. The collaboration aims to enhance the speed and effectiveness of the clinical trial process. Pi Health and GSK have formally agreed to a Master Clinical Services Outsourcing Agreement for the partnership, and have already commenced preparatory measures for a Phase 2 oncology clinical trial on a global scale.

data.title: Forté acquires Informationsteknik in Sweden and Denmark to expand internationally in Minnesota.
data.description: Forté, a company based in Minneapolis, has recently broadened its global reach through the acquisition of Informationsteknik in Sweden and Denmark. This strategic move allows Forté to enhance its presence in the international market and capitalize on new opportunities. The acquisition includes the takeover of all Informationsteknik's assets and operations in both countries. This expansion is expected to significantly increase Forté's market share and strengthen its position in the European region. With this acquisition, Forté aims to better serve its customers and drive growth in the overseas market.
